log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dwarf — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 4 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:8+0=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:11+0=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:10+0=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:20+0=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 3/4 targets affected.
--- Werewolf --- HP: 58/58 | AC: 11
REASONING: Moving toward Dwarf — Winged Striker (55ft away). Dashing.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Dwarf — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Werewolf --- HP: 58/58 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
